meta.title: NeXify AI — Websites & Software by an Expert · €999/day
meta.description: Personal B2B web development: websites, shops, apps and automation at a transparent daily rate.

hero.headline: Websites and software by an expert.
hero.description: Pascal Courbois combines hands-on experience, clear accountability and cutting-edge AI-powered development. The result: high-quality websites, shops, web apps, mobile apps and automations at a transparent price.

proof.shop: for a shop or app MVP

services.title: Everything a digital product truly needs.
services.subtitle: Strategy, design, development, integrations, testing and handover from one responsible hand. No anonymous production chain.

why.title: Experience saves detours. AI saves lead time.
why.subtitle: The price isn't lower because of less responsibility — it's lower because of less friction: no bloated teams, no handover loops, no months-long production cycles.

process.title: A clear path from goal to verified result.
process.subtitle: Scope is planned in working days upfront. Each phase produces visible decisions, results and reviews.

calculator.title: Transparency, not package fog.
calculator.description: Choose the planned working days. The actual scope is defined before project start based on features, content, integrations and acceptance criteria.
calculator.note: For cross-border B2B services within the EU, reverse charge may apply with a valid VAT ID.

cta.kicker: Start with a clear cost estimate
cta.title: Describe your goal. You'll receive scope, working days and a price range.
cta.description: No non-binding sales pitch — a professional initial assessment: what's needed, what can wait, and how to implement it cost-effectively.
cta.response: Response to qualified inquiries typically within one business day

faq.title: Clear answers before project start.
faq.subtitle: The most important points about pricing, scope and collaboration.

testimonials.q1: A complete website in three days — and the result looks like it was built by a large agency. Pascal immediately understood what we needed.
testimonials.q2: Finally a developer who honestly says what makes sense and what doesn't. No tech jargon, just clear recommendations.
testimonials.q3: The price was transparent, the communication direct, the result on time. This is how collaboration should always work.

footer.description: AI-powered websites, shops, apps and automations — personally designed, developed and tested.

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.description: The link may be outdated or the URL contains a typo.
